title: oneaura's CPS Counter
description: A highly customizable CPS counter with a fully draggable HUD.
body: # oneaura's CPS Counter A highly customizable CPS counter with a fully draggable HUD. ## Features | Feature | Description | | :--- | :--- | | Master Switch | Completely toggle on/off the mod! | | Button | Either show your left click CPS or right click CPS or show both! | | Draggable HUD | You can put the mod anywhere on the HUD! | | Custom Text Color | Changeable text color. **(hex color code)** | | "CPS" Label | You can either change the "CPS" label or completely disable it! | | Text Style | The style of the text can be changed to normal, bold, and italic. | | Background | You can change the radius and the color of the background or completely disable the background! | --- ## Disclaimer This plugin is licensed under the **[MIT License](https://github.com/oneauraaa/oneauras-cps-counter)**.
